docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASTA FUNDING ACQUISITION III, L.L.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, RICHARD $7,992.78 PRINCIPAL, $2,814.15 INTEREST, $154.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,961.43, SEE SCANNED DOC
